---
description: Prevent editing auto-generated files that are built from descriptors
globs:
  - "linters/*/Dockerfile"
  - "flavors/*/Dockerfile"
  - "flavors/*/action.yml"
  - "flavors/*/flavor.json"
  - "docs/descriptors/**"
  - "docs/supported-linters.md"
  - ".automation/generated/**"
---

# Generated Files — Do Not Edit

These files are auto-generated by `.automation/build.py` from YAML descriptors.

Manual edits will be overwritten on the next `make megalinter-build` run.

To change these files:
1. Modify the source YAML descriptor in `megalinter/descriptors/`
2. Or modify the build logic in `.automation/build.py`
3. Then run `make megalinter-build` (never `make megalinter-build-with-doc` — docs are handled by auto-update workflows)

Test class files in `megalinter/tests/test_megalinter/linters/` that contain the header
`"automatically @generated by .automation/build.py"` are also generated — do not edit them directly.
